description_long: This is a stylized, cartoonish representation of a large ape, most closely resembling a gorilla or chimpanzee, with exaggerated features. The animal has a prominent, rounded head with a pronounced brow and large, expressive eyes. Its fur is a deep brown, with lighter beige coloring on the face, ears, hands, and feet. The arms are long and muscular, extending well past the knees, and the legs are shorter and robust, ending in large, flat feet. The animal's posture is upright but slightly hunched, with its arms crossed in front of its body. The overall appearance is playful and animated, suggesting a character designed for visual appeal in an urban or park setting.
description: A cartoonish, brown-furred ape with a large head, expressive eyes, and long, muscular arms crossed in front. Its beige face and hands contrast with its deep brown fur, giving it a playful, animated look.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the ape's large head, expressive eyes, and crossed arms, with the face and upper body most visible.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the length of the arms and the side profile of the head, with less detail on the face.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the crossed arms, with the legs and feet visible from behind.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the right arm and leg, with a partial view of the face and the side of the body.
